matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Itinerary > Day 10 > CN Tower EdgeWalk

node.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
node.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Itinerary > Day 4 > Full-Day Workshop

node.name: Full-Day Workshop
node.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Itinerary > Day 10 > YYZ Departure

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Stakeholder Presentation

node.name: Stakeholder Presentation
node.description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 2 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Strategy Workshop

node.name: Strategy Workshop
node.description: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.
